title: Glorious Golden Indian Dumplings Gulab Jamun
description: A funky, aerated, one-pot Indian dish featuring vegan-friendly ingredients, this gulab jamun recipe is a unique twist on traditional Indian cuisine, with a smoky cold flavor and a golden brown color.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the all purpose flour, semolina, and cardamom powder to make the dumpling mixture.
Gradually add the non dairy milk to the dumpling mixture and knead until a smooth dough forms.
Divide the dough into small balls and deep fry them in hot oil until they are golden brown.
In a separate pot, combine the sugar, water, and rose water to make the syrup.
Bring the syrup to a boil, then reduce the heat and let it simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the fried dumplings to the syrup and let them soak for 5 minutes.
Remove the dumplings from the syrup and place them on a serving plate.
Drizzle the remaining syrup over the dumplings and serve warm.
Garnish with lemon juice and vegan butter for added flavor.
